Legal and trust

How to play Controls, scoring, and offline play guide. FAQ Free play, privacy, install, and support answers. Updates Design notes and product update log. Privacy Game data, consent, ads, and controls. Terms Free use, game rules, and availability. User agreement Clear agreement for using Brikaya. License Reserved rights and permitted use. Data deletion How to erase local data and ask for help. Cookies and ads How the browser and ads may save choices. Support Contact for help, privacy, and safety. About Game summary and commitment to free access.

Use of these pages

These pages were prepared so players, search engines, and platforms can find public information about Brikaya at stable addresses.

When a material game feature changes, these pages should be reviewed and updated.

Official contact

Use contato@brikaya.com for privacy, support, rights, data deletion, and use questions.
